name: Alex's Toolbox
description:
A metal box containing mainly saws and vice grips of varying sizes but also other tools. Even though the content of this Toolbox is clearly aimed at destructive deeds, it can be used to repair various mechanical components as well.

18 charges.Increases repair speed by 10%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 100%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

name: Annotated Map
description:
The sketch is clear and detailed. Strange knowledge flows into you, followed by dread uncertainty.

Press the Use Item Button to reveal auras of all pallets and vaults within 40 meters for 14 seconds.Using the secondary interaction creates a beam of light at the Survivor's location. Generators within 32 meters of the beam of light have their auras revealed.6 charges.

name: Apprentice's Fog Vial
description:
Made by the hands of a diligent but timid novice.

Releases concentrated Fog.Fog Cloud lasts for 8 secondsFog Cloud expands to a maximum of 8 meters.While inside a Fog Cloud, auras are suppressed, and Survivors leave no scratch marks and make no sound.Has 4 charges.Recharges over 70 seconds.

name: Artisan's Fog Vial
description: Crafted by an experienced glazier with a love for her craft.Releases concentrated Fog.Fog Cloud lasts for 10 secondsFog Cloud expands to a maximum of 8 meters.While inside a Fog Cloud, auras are suppressed, and Survivors leave no scratch marks and make no sound.Has 4 charges.Recharges over 65 seconds.

name: Broken Key
description:
The bow and shank of a key, vibrating with power.


Consume a charge to:

Reveal auras of Survivors within 48 meters for 8 seconds by holding the Use Item Button.


Begins with 6 charges.

name: Camping Aid Kit
description:
A rudimentary aid kit which can save lives in emergencies, even if it's lacking some of its supplies.

24 charges.Increases the speed that you heal others by 35%.Unlocks the self-healing action.Decreases the speed and efficiency when healing yourself by 33%.

A full heal requires 16 charges.

name: Chinese Firecracker
description:
A row of small explosive devices wrapped in heavy paper casing. Detonates into loud bangs and intense light flashes. Can be used as a distraction, as a blinding device or to celebrate.

1 charge.

name: Commodious Toolbox
description:
A large metal box containing basic tools and extra mechanical parts. Even without training, can be used to repair or break various mechanical components.

32 charges.Increases repair speed by 50%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 50%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

name: Cryptic Map
description:
Looking at it, the directions make no sense. But merely holding it grants you an uncanny intuition.

Press the Use Item Button to reveal auras of all pallets and vaults within 24 meters for 10 seconds.Using the secondary interaction creates a beam of light at the Survivor's location. Generators within 32 meters of the beam of light have their auras revealed.4 charges.

name: Dull Key
description:
A bent and dull Key that once held great power.


Consume a charge to:

Reveal auras of Survivors within 56 meters for 9 seconds by holding the Use Item Button.Unlock Chests quickly. Chests unlocked with this Key have a revealed aura within 42 meters, enabling another Survivor to rummage once, and will contain items of at least Rare quality.Unlock the Hatch.


Begins with 5 charges.

name: Emergency Med-kit
description:
A sturdy and well organized medical kit equipped with top condition emergency supplies.

24 charges.Increases the speed that you heal others by 45%.Unlocks the self-healing action.Decreases the speed and efficiency when healing yourself by 33%.

A full heal requires 16 charges.

name: Engineer's Toolbox
description:
Metal box with highly specialized tools meant for engineering. Most of the tools can still be used by neophytes to make fast repairs or break various mechanical components.

16 charges.Increases repair speed by 100%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 10%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

name: First Aid Kit
description:
A standard first aid kit with all the necessary equipment for treating common to more serious injuries.

24 charges.Increases the speed that you heal others by 40%.Unlocks the self-healing action.Decreases the speed and efficiency when healing yourself by 33%.

A full heal requires 16 charges.

name: Flashlight
description:
A standard Flashlight. Can be used to light your way in the darkness.

8 seconds of use.

name: Mechanic's Toolbox
description:
Metal box with specialized mechanics tools. Even without training, can be used to repair or break various mechanical components.

16 charges.Increases repair speed by 75%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 25%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

name: Ranger Med-kit
description:
A large metal box containing medical supplies aimed for emergency rescues in hard to reach, often isolated locations.

24 charges.Increases the speed that you heal others by 50%.Unlocks the self-healing action.Decreases the speed and efficiency when healing yourself by 33%.

A full heal requires 16 charges.

name: Scribbled Map
description:
Peering at the parchment, a path appears in your mind. Moments later, you feel lost again.

Press the Use Item Button to reveal auras of all pallets and vaults within 32 meters for 12 seconds.Using the secondary interaction creates a beam of light at the Survivor's location. Generators within 32 meters of the beam of light have their auras revealed.5 charges.

name: Skeleton Key
description:
A tarnished and crooked key, vibrating with ominous power.


Consume a charge to:

Reveal auras of Survivors within 64 meters for 10 seconds by holding the Use Item Button.Unlock Chests quickly. Chests unlocked with this Key have a revealed aura within 42 meters, enabling another Survivor to rummage once, and will contain items of at least Rare quality.Unlock the Hatch.


Begins with 6 charges.

name: Sport Flashlight
description:
A very portable Flashlight with a good grip. Its efficient technology produces a powerful light while consuming less power.

8 Seconds of use.Decreases Flashlight battery consumption by 11%.Increases the accuracy of the Flashlight beam by 20%.

name: Toolbox
description:
Metal box containing a set of basic tools. Even without training, can be used to repair or break various mechanical components.

20 charges.Increases repair speed by 50%.Unlocks the sabotage action.Increases sabotage speed by 15%.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.

name: Utility Flashlight
description:
A sturdy but heavy Flashlight that packs a lot of power.

12 Seconds of use.Increases the brightness of the Flashlight beam by 30%.Increases Blindness duration by 15%.Decreases the accuracy of the Flashlight beam by 20%.

name: Vigo's Fog Vial
description: From the man’s own collection. Impeccable. Unparalleled.Releases concentrated Fog.Fog Cloud lasts for 12 secondsFog Cloud expands to a maximum of 8 meters.While inside a Fog Cloud, auras are suppressed, and Survivors leave no scratch marks and make no sound.Has 4 charges.Recharges over 60 seconds.

name: Worn-out Tools
description:
Metal box containing out of condition tools that could break at any moment. Even without training, can be used to repair or break various mechanical components.

16 charges.Increases repair speed by 50%.Decreases Skill Check success zone size by 10%.Unlocks the sabotage action.

Repairing a generator requires 90 charges.

Sabotaging a hook requires 6 charges.
